revision.comment: /* top */Remove CfD template; discussion closed as Speedy/[[WP:SNOW]] keep
1 revision imported: importing a single revision to get rid of a red link
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]" to ""
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing redirects]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:People associated with Balliol College, Oxford]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]].↵" to " "
Adding [[Category:undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Removing from [[Category:Undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8236957)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8236957)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category|Alumni of Balliol College, Oxford}}
{{Portal|University of Oxford}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8236957}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Alumni of Balliol College, Oxford]]
[[en:Category:Alumni of Balliol College, Oxford]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Alumni of the University of Oxford by college|Balliol College]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Alumni_of_Balliol_College%2C_Oxford here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
